title: Xcel Energy (XEL) Rides on Investment, Clean Power Generation
text: Xcel Energy (XEL) is expected to further benefit from systematic investments, renewable expansion and customer growth.

title: Xcel Energy Inc. Board Declares Dividend on Common Stock
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Board of Directors of Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: XEL) today declared a quarterly dividend on its common stock of 52 cents per share. The dividends are payable October 20, 2023, to shareholders of record on September 15, 2023. Xcel Energy is a major U.S. electricity and natural gas company, with operations in 8 Western and Midwestern states. Xcel Energy provides a comprehensive portfolio of energy-related products and services to 3.8 million electricity customers.

title: Xcel Energy Elects Timothy Welsh to Board of Directors
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Xcel Energy announced today that Timothy Welsh has been elected to the company's board of directors, effective immediately. Welsh, who currently serves as vice chair for U.S. Bancorp's Consumer and Business Banking, is an accomplished business and community leader with decades of experience in a variety of diverse fields, including financial services, customer experience, workforce development, and operations. title: 3 Dividend Stocks to Buy if You Believe Inflation is Coming Back
text: We don't know how much relief most Americans are feeling from the effects of inflation, particularly at the grocery store. But we live in a data-driven world, and the data says that inflation is retreating on a year-over-year basis.
